brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (C) with valid final-step logic; only states the last constraint and conclusion without tracing the full timeline or exploring why; no reflection on reasoning process or potential error sources; does not verify by checking other options or confirming all time slots are filled; presents answer with full certainty and no acknowledgment of assumptions; ignores options A/B/D entirely without explaining why they fail; shows only the last leg of the derivation (9pm endpoint + 10pm closure) but omits the full sequential elimination of the earlier time blocks
